original: “Hm,” Narc blinks, her lips a flat line. “Very well then.” You watch her mill around for a few seconds, scooping up her bag and flattening her skirt. “I must return to my corner now. It is quite the competitive area, and should not be left empty for long. Be sure to drink plenty of fluids, and have a most pleasant day.” After giving you a small bow, she turns and leaves. You take a few moments to collect yourself, then decide what to do next.
translation: “嗯，” 娜克眨了眨眼，嘴唇抿成一条线。“那好吧。” 你看着她忙活了几秒，拎起包，抚平裙子。“我得回我的角落去了。那地方竞争激烈，可不能空太久。记得多喝水，祝你愉快。” 她向你微微鞠了一躬，转身离去。 你花了一会儿定了定神，然后决定接下来做什么。
context: <> textify(['“Hm,” Narc blinks, her lips a flat line.

original: A glint of something catches your eye nestled amongst your defeated assailants cleavage. One quick tug is all it takes to yank the thing free. You found a Gabilani Data Chip. Perhaps this is exactly the thing Narc was looking for?\n\n(Key Item Obtained: Gabilani Data Chip)
translation: 你瞥见倒地的袭击者乳沟间有什么东西闪了一下。伸手一拽，那东西便到了你手里。你发现了一枚加比拉尼数据芯片。这或许正是娜克要找的东西？\n\n(获得关键物品：加比拉尼数据芯片)
